mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT A.currentDateTime, count(*) as todayConstruction FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C
GROUP BY A.currentDateTime) AS AA
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C

SELECT MAX(B.machineNumber) AS machineNumber, A.currentDateTime, COUNT(*) as todayConstruction FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C
group by A.currentDateTime ORDER BY A.currentDateTime DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}
